absent.kv_reuse: planning uses synthetic UNIQUE prefixes (PR #112) → no KV-reuse prediction is consumed
absent.queue_pressure: emergent from arrival+service, not a planner input forecast
absent.sla_pressure: emergent from arrival+service+SLA, not a planner input forecast
absent.carbon: not wired into the MPC objective or world model
absent.weather: not wired into the MPC objective or world model
absent.congestion: no live network-congestion model in the serving replay (ABSENT since PR #98)

absent_forecasts.kv_reuse: planning uses synthetic UNIQUE prefixes (PR #112) → no KV-reuse prediction is consumed
absent_forecasts.queue_pressure: emergent from arrival+service, not a planner input forecast
absent_forecasts.sla_pressure: emergent from arrival+service+SLA, not a planner input forecast
absent_forecasts.carbon: not wired into the MPC objective or world model
absent_forecasts.weather: not wired into the MPC objective or world model
absent_forecasts.congestion: no live network-congestion model in the serving replay (ABSENT since PR #98)

regret_decomposition.methodology: Current/Scenario/Oracle vary ONLY the planning workload → the Current→Oracle gap is forecast quality by construction; search measured separately; world-model fidelity is NOT isolable in pure simulation (shared simulator) and needs real telemetry.

roadmap.improvement: real serving telemetry (to attribute world-model fidelity)
roadmap.confidence: high (it is the only way to isolate simulator error)
roadmap.evidence: world-model fidelity is UNMEASURABLE in pure simulation
